_meta.description: Master asset manifest for the Oasiz Game Studio sprite library. Each category has its own detailed manifest.json with individual sprite descriptions, animations, colors, sizes, and paths.

categories.name: characters
categories.description: Playable character sprites with full animation sets (idle, run, jump, attack, die, etc.)

packs.name: Classic Character
packs.description: 2D platformer character: 4 color styles (red/blue, green/red, violet/blue, blue/red) with idle, run, jump, fall, 3-hit punch combo, dash attack, get_hit, die, celebrate, talk, wall_cling + dash_fx effect

packs.name: Valiant Knight
packs.description: Armored medieval knight: 4 color styles (red/gold, purple/gold, brown/gold, green/gold). Sword and shield combat with 3-hit attack combo, guard/block system (start/loop/end), jump, get_hit, die + 3 block impact effects (64x64)

categories.name: enemies
categories.description: Enemy/monster sprites with multiple animation states, colors, and combat behaviors

packs.name: Super Pixel Monsters Pack 1
packs.examples: bone_statue, demon_eye, hell_skull, leech, mudman, shrubtooth, skull_beetle, skull_slime, winged_skull, wraith

packs.name: Mega Monster Pack
packs.examples: bat, pumpkin, skull_bat, spider, spirit — each with regular (64x64) and mini (32x32) variants

packs.name: Super Pixel Alien Monster Pack 1
packs.examples: crawling_horror, grub, hopclops, space_fly, egg — sci-fi aliens with large/small in 3 color variants (A/B/C) + splatter & projectile sub-sprites

packs.name: Super Pixel Alien Monster Pack 2
packs.examples: amoeba, exofish, moon_muncher, skittermite, wall_gazer, xenomantis, egg — advanced aliens with burrow/dissolve/reform behaviors + splatter & projectile sub-sprites

packs.name: Flying Demon
packs.examples: flying_demon — large boss-type flying monster with 6 color styles (A-F), charged attacks, and fireball projectile (106x104)

categories.name: projectile-effects
categories.description: Animated projectile sprites for bullets, missiles, magic bolts, and other flying objects

packs.name: Super Pixel Projectiles Pack 1
packs.examples: blob, electricity, energy, fireball, laser, magic missile, rock, scifi missile, slash, toon missile

packs.name: Super Pixel Projectiles Pack 2
packs.examples: fireball, ground shockwave, helix beam, ice spike, kunai, lightning orb, magic missile, meteor, scifi missile, shuriken

packs.name: Super Pixel Projectiles Pack 3
packs.examples: acid, arrow (impact+loop), death wave, demon bite (impact+loop), knife, light spark, magic hex, magic missile, magic orb, magic spike

packs.name: Super Pixel Projectiles Pack 4
packs.examples: dark matter, energy blast A/B, energy pellet, laser beam A/B, plasma ball, sawblade, scifi bomb, scrap metal

categories.name: skill-effects
categories.description: Animated VFX sprites for explosions, spells, impacts, lightning, fire, smoke, magic bursts, UI symbols, elemental magic, status effects, and hand-crafted particle effects

packs.name: Super Pixel Effects Pack 1
packs.examples: aura energy, dash, electric zap, energy shield, explosion, impact dust, impact hit, magic puff, splash, splatter

packs.name: Super Pixel Effects Pack 2
packs.examples: bubble (appear/loop/pop), claw, electric burst, explosion, fire burst, ice burst, impact shock, magic swirl, slash, splatter

packs.name: Super Pixel Effects Pack 3
packs.examples: bite, dust trail, impact hit, lightning aura, magic spawn, smoke bomb, splatter, toon explosion, toon impact, warp

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 1
packs.examples: spellcast (4 variants A/B/C/D), magic burst (2 variants), magic puff (2 variants), power up, skull puff — casting circles & magic effects in 7 colors with large/small sizes

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 2
packs.examples: fire spell, ice spell, lightning spell (start/loop/end + tileable), wind spell, cure (front/back), claw, absorb, poison, shatter, earth spikes — elemental combat magic in 9-10 colors

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 3
packs.examples: pain, death, barrier, haste, rejuvenate, slow, stop, gaze, attack up, defense up — status effects and buff/debuff spells in 6-8 colors

packs.name: Will's Magic Pixel Particle Effects
packs.examples: charge A/B, fire A/B/C, spellcast variants (two/four/six trail), implosion A/B, shield burst, sword burst, square burst, vortex, spirals, sparkle puff, purple wisp, raw particles library

categories.name: skill-icons
categories.description: 32x32 pixel art skill/ability icons with 3 color variants each, plus cooldown/highlight animations and HUD frames

packs.name: Super Pixel Skill Icons Pack 1
packs.examples: attack up, blind, chain, claw, cleave, cure, darkness, dash, death, defense up, fireball, guard, holy light, ice burst, lightning, poison, storm, vampire

packs.name: Super Pixel Skill Icons Pack 2
packs.examples: avalanche, bow and arrow, cauldron, curse, entangle, fairy, fireball, freeze, heal, kunai, lightning hand, magic crystal, magic shield, runes, shuriken, tornado

extras: HUD skill bar frames (2 styles per pack)
